case_title: PETERSON, LINDA DIANNE vs. BAMBERG, KAREN M. IND/DBA O! DELI

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PETERSON, LINDA DIANNE AS TO DEFENDANT BAMBERG, KAREN M. IND/DBA O! DELI
